title: lathyrus pannonicus var. sumenii
intro: Lathyrus pannonicus var. sumenii, also known as the hairy pea, is a variant of the Lathyrus pannonicus plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the pea family. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of lathyrogens, which are toxic compounds that have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lathyrus pannonicus var. sumenii include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
